flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Napa Valley College rose 55% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.5k → $7.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Napa Valley College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $11.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Napa Valley College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($506 → $660).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Napa Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
